title: Email text area windows - Let them scale!
excerpt: You used to be able to adjust the email text area window now its a tiny window in the corner. The new actual email text area is pointless 550x225 that’s 30% of the size of a small mobile phone screen. Its impossible to d…

posts.author: zerolabs (Adam )
posts.cookedHtml:
You used to be able to adjust the email text area window now its a tiny window in the corner. The new actual email text area is pointless 550x225 that’s 30% of the size of a small mobile phone screen. Its impossible to draft letters when you have to scroll after the 3rd row. I understand you want to fit a lot of modules, so give the customer a choice. I have played with the larger email enough to say its really great to be able to have that open for more complicated client updates.

Let them scale!!

unnamed-21567×1282 161 KB

posts.author: admsmith82 (Adam Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely agree, with an email signature it has become very crowded and close to unusable.
